design_philosophy: Premium, OLED-optimized dark UI with cinematic golden accents. Inspired by Shazam and Spotify. Focus on absolute minimalism, centered alignments, and magical micro-interactions (pulsing mic).

pulse.description: Create 2-3 concentric circular Views behind the mic button. Use Animated.Value to scale from 1 to 2.5 while opacity goes from 0.5 to 0. Loop it using Animated.loop. Creates a radar/sonar emission effect indicating the app is listening.

fade.description: Use standard LayoutAnimation or Animated.timing for screen transitions and appearing elements to feel smooth.

elements: Top: Clean logo (logo-clean.png), resizeMode='contain', no background, width 80, height 80
Below Logo: Text 'Tom Certo' in Outfit_800ExtraBold, size 36, centered
Middle: Giant mic button (width 120, height 120, borderRadius 60, backgroundColor '#FFB020'). Wrapped in pulsing animated rings. Icon inside is a mic (e.g., from @expo/vector-icons), color #000.

Bottom: Button 'Iniciar Detecção'. Background solid #FFB020 with shadow glow (shadowColor: '#FFB020', shadowOpacity: 0.5, shadowRadius: 15, elevation: 10). Text color #000, Manrope_600SemiBold. Large padding (paddingVertical 16, paddingHorizontal 40), borderRadius 30, testID='start-detection-button'.
Top: Clean logo + 'Tom Certo' (smaller than initial, e.g., size 28)
Middle: TextInput for Token. backgroundColor '#141414', borderRadius 12, padding 16, color '#FFF', borderColor '#2A2A2A', borderWidth 1, testID='activation-token-input'
Bottom: Activation CTA Button, solid #FFB020, testID='activation-submit-button'.
Center: Actively pulsing mic button (faster/intense pulse animation)
Above/Below: Live updating note (e.g. 'C', 'G#') in massive font (Outfit_800ExtraBold, size 72, color #FFFFFF)
Text: 'Ouvindo...' below the note, Manrope_400Regular, color #A0A0A0
Top Area: 'Tom Detectado' label in Manrope_500Medium, color '#A0A0A0'
Hero: The actual Note/Key (e.g. 'D Maior') in Outfit_800ExtraBold, color '#FFB020', size 48

Middle: 'Campo Harmônico' section. Grid or list of chords. Rendered as sleek chips/cards in surface '#141414', borderRadius 12, border 1px solid '#2A2A2A'. Text inside Manrope_600SemiBold, color '#FFF'.
Bottom: 'Tentar Novamente' secondary button, borderColor '#FFB020', borderWidth 1, text color '#FFB020', testID='retry-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent.critical_tech_stack: React Native Expo app. DO NOT USE HTML, DIVS, CSS, className OR TAILWIND. Use native primitives: View, Text, TouchableOpacity, Image, TextInput. Style entirely with StyleSheet.create().
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_attributes: Add testID prop to all interactive and key informational elements. Do NOT use data-testid. Example: testID='start-detection-button'
instructions_to_main_agent.assets_handling: Use local assets as requested: require('./logo-clean.png') and require('./icon.png'). Remove any background squares/circles from the logo container. Keep resizeMode='contain' and style the image component to have no background.
instructions_to_main_agent.glow_effects: Since React Native lacks CSS drop-shadow, use the 'shadowColor', 'shadowOffset', 'shadowOpacity', 'shadowRadius', and 'elevation' properties in StyleSheet to create a golden halo around the primary button and mic. Example: shadowColor: '#FFB020', shadowOpacity: 0.4, shadowRadius: 10.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use @expo/vector-icons (e.g., Ionicons or Feather) for the microphone icon. If not already installed, prompt the user or add it. Place it inside the Shazam-style circular button.
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_cleanliness: Eliminate amateur visuals. Apply generous padding, absolute center alignment for the Initial Screen, and rely heavily on negative space and high contrast between #000 background and #FFB020 accents.
